name: Iso11783IL_BlockTxMessage
title: Iso11783IL_BlockTxMessage
syntax: long Iso11783IL_BlockTxMessage(dword pgn, dword destinationAddress, qword filterMask, qword filterValue); // form 1
long Iso11783IL_BlockTxMessage(dbNode node, dword pgn, dword destinationAddress, qword filterMask, qword filterValue); // form 2
description: Prevents transmitting of a message generated and sent by the interaction layer.
The message to block is specified by PGN, destination address and a part of the first eight data bytes.
To revert this command you can use Iso11783IL_ResetBlockedTxMessage or Iso11783IL_ResetAllBlockedTxMessages.

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: The message with this PGN shall be blocked.

parameters.name: destinationAddress
parameters.description: 0 - 255: The message which is sent to this address shall be blocked. 0xFFFFFFFF (-1): The destination address of the message doesn’t matter.

parameters.name: filterMask
parameters.description: Defines the bits of the message which shall be used to identify the message.

parameters.name: filterValue
parameters.description: Defines the value of the bits of the message which shall be used to identify the message. If the value of the masked bits of a sent message is equal to this value then the data of the message is blocked.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
